## ⚠️ Sensitive Information

**Please do not disclose sensitive information publicly if this is a security vulnerability.**

Consider contacting the maintainers directly for critical security issues.

## Issue Type
- [ ] Vulnerability (XSS, SQL Injection, etc.)
- [ ] Data Exposure
- [ ] Authentication/Authorization Issue
- [ ] API Security
- [ ] Dependency Vulnerability
- [ ] Other (describe below)

<!-- Describe the security issue in detail. -->

## Affected Components
<!-- List the files, endpoints, or features affected. -->

## Steps to Reproduce (Private)
<!-- Provide reproduction steps privately if possible. -->

## Impact
<!-- What is the potential impact of this issue? -->

## Suggested Fix
<!-- If you have suggestions on how to fix this issue. -->

- Project Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Node.js: [e.g. 18.x]
- Browser/Runtime: [if applicable]
